title: Dungeons Perspective
body:
REQUIRES SODIUM  IN  FABRIC, FOR 1.20.1 AND 1.21.1

REQUIRES EMBEDDIUM IN FORGE, FOR 1.20.1

IF YOU FIND YOURSELF INVISIBLE THROUGH WALLS, DISABLE ANY FORM OF ENTITY CULLING

(NEO)FORGE REQUIRES SINYTRA CONNECTOR

 

This mod adds a top-down perspective similar to Minecraft Dungeons.

The angle looking down is 45 degrees, the FOV is 45 degrees, and the camera can be rotated 360 degrees. 

Press F4 to enter the perspective.

Click and hold the middle mouse button to move the camera around your character.

You can press the Home button to lock the camera to a pseudo-isometric view. 

 

Now with Click-to-move! Toggle it on in the Mod Menu.

In this mode, right click to move, left click to attack. Certain ranged weapons such as bows and crossbows will have their shoot ability mapped to left click.

To interact with stuff (normally right-click), press G (Rebindable).

 

Features:

Full 360 degree rotation around the player

Top down view inspired by Minecraft Dungeons

Zoom in and out

Block culling for blocks between the character and the camera

Targeting behind walls between the character and the camera

Contextual Camera Offset mode to make kiting targets easier

 

Player rotation to mouse position is retained for a duration after interaction

Otherwise, player is rotated towards direction of movement

Horse support - Horse rotation is decoupled from player when attacking

Spell Engine support

Sodium support

 

 

This mod is a work in progress, and I am working hard to get it on more versions of Minecraft- please be patient.
